title: HAT FAIL: demonstrates a wrong HAT1 fraction and a broken Fibonacci-box determinant
sources: The Pythagorean Tree: A New Species (Price, 2008)
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants two independent, deterministically detectable violations in the general_theorem witness format: (1) direction (3,2) declares HAT1_num/HAT1_den=1/2 instead of the correct e/d=2/3; (2) the same witness declares a Fibonacci box determinant of 99 instead of the correct 2*5-1*3=7.

general_theorem.statement: For all d>e>0 with gcd(d,e)=1 and d+e odd: HAT1=e/d=C/(G+F), HAT2=(d-e)/(d+e)=F/(G+C), s=E/G=HAT1^2/(1+HAT1^2)

witnesses.check: deliberately wrong: HAT1 should be e/d=2/3, not 1/2; det should be 2*5-1*3=7, not 99

fail_ledger.message: witness (3,2) declared Fibonacci box det=99, expected 2*5-1*3=7
